description: Style NoteCreated by basics for the ardent baseball fan, sport this blue cap to express your support as well as to beat the scorching sun during a match. Available to you at a price that does not burn a hole in your pocket, this cap is a must buy.Product DetailsRed cap, embroidered on the front, eyelets on the crown, curved blue visor, adjustable back strap with brandingMaterial and Care100% polyesterHand wash cold waterDo not dry cleanLine dry
